# Jobs API

Manage service jobs programmatically.

## Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/jobs` | List all jobs |
| POST | `/api/jobs` | Create a job |
| GET | `/api/jobs/:id` | Get job details |
| PUT | `/api/jobs/:id` | Update a job |
| DELETE | `/api/jobs/:id` | Delete a job |
| POST | `/api/jobs/import` | Import jobs from CSV |
| GET | `/api/jobs/export` | Export jobs |
| GET | `/api/jobs/visits` | Get job visits |

## FieldCamp Integration

Jobs synced from FieldCamp are also available via:

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/fieldcamp/jobs` | Get FieldCamp jobs |
| GET | `/api/fieldcamp/jobs/:id` | Get FieldCamp job details |
| GET | `/api/fieldcamp/jobs/pending` | Get pending FieldCamp jobs |
